title: Biden reconoció la Pascua como Día de la Visibilidad Transexual | Hechos
shortDescription: Este año, la Casa Blanca reconoció tanto el Domingo de Resurrección como el Día de la Visibilidad Transexual, que cayeron ambos el 31 de marzo.

title: Biden recognized both Easter and Transgender Visibility Day | Fact check
shortDescription: This year, the White House recognized both Easter Sunday and the Transgender Day of Visibility, which both fell on March 31.

title: OnPolitics: Trump leads Biden in six key swing states
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is leading President Joe Biden in six key swing states, a new Wall Street Journal poll found.

title: Looking at Don Hankey, the billionaire who fronted Donald Trump's bond
shortDescription: California billionaire Don Hankey is the man who paid Former President Donald J. Trump's $175 million bond as a part of a civil case in New York.

title: Biden, Sanders team up on prescription drug costs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and Senator Bernie Sanders are working together to combat prescription drug costs and pressure Republicans to get on board.

title: Biden gets assist from Bernie Sanders to tout health care efforts
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is teaming up with Bernie Sanders on prescription drug costs. Sanders could help Biden with progressives and younger Americans.

title: Wisconsin Gov. vetoes bill aimed at trans and nonbinary athletes: What to know
shortDescription: Wisconsin Gov. Tony Evers vetoed a bill Tuesday that would have banned trans and nonbinary youth from playing on teams that align with their identity.

title: Muslim doctor walks out of Ramadan meeting with Biden in protest over Gaza
shortDescription: Dr. Thaer Ahmad's walkout underscored the anger many in the Arab American community have towards Joe Biden over his support for Israel's war in Gaza.

title: Biden says House Speaker 'thoroughly uninformed' in 'Transgender Day' Easter criticism
shortDescription: President Joe Biden described House Speaker Mike Johnson as “thoroughly uninformed” after the latter claimed he had “betrayed the tenet of Easter” by proclaiming Easter Sunday as Transgender Day.

title: Trump leads Biden in six key swing states, new poll finds
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is leading President Joe Biden in six key swing states, a new poll found, amid concerns about the economy and job performance.

title: Money chase: Donald Trump, GOP say they raised $65.6 million in March
shortDescription: Trump and allies seek to ease GOP concerns about President Joe Biden's advantage in campaign money.

title: Prosecutors: judge's jury instructions 'wrong' in Trump documents case
shortDescription: Federal Judge Aileen Cannon proposed jury instructions that echoed Donald Trump's view in classified records case, which prosecutors called "wrong."

title: Daily Briefing: Is Florida now in play for Biden?
shortDescription: Abortion on the ballot energizes a Democratic push in the state. Here is the news to know Wednesday.

title: Trump put Ruby Garcia's murder at center of border security debate
shortDescription: Hardline immigration rhetoric has been a hallmark of Trump's political brand. He's focusing on crimes committed by undocumented immigrants.

title: Controversial Texas immigration law S.B. 4 gets its day in court
shortDescription: A federal appeals court will decide whether the Texas immigration law S.B. 4 is legal. The measure is mobilizing activists who want to see it undone.

title: Wisconsin voters approve Republican-led measure targeting election funding
shortDescription: Wisconsin voters decided on two state constitutional amendments that could alter how elections are run in the 2024 battleground.

title: Barack Obama reemerges to support the Biden campaign
shortDescription: Barack Obama has begun campaigning for his former vice president, President Joe Biden. Obama is expected to be active on the campaign trail in 2024.

title: Legal weed: Florida to vote on legalizing recreational pot in November
shortDescription: The Florida Supreme Court on Monday approved a recreational marijuana constitutional amendment for the November 2024 statewide ballot.

title: Donald Trump doubles down on 'bloodbath' warning as he criticizes Joe Biden
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump returned to the campaign trail Tuesday and again employed the violent imagery of a "bloodbath."

title: No, Biden did not end Social Security with order | Fact check
shortDescription: By scrolling past a video without listening, a social media user could believe that President Biden ended Social Security, SSI and "side hustles."
